description: An opioid pain medication used to treat moderate to moderately severe pain.
indication: Moderate to severe pain management

description: A serotonin antagonist and reuptake inhibitor (SARI) antidepressant.
indication: Major depressive disorder, insomnia, and anxiety

description: A first-generation antihistamine of the piperazine class that also has anti-anxiety properties.
indication: Anxiety, itching (pruritus), hives, and nausea

description: A direct-acting smooth muscle vasodilator that lowers peripheral vascular resistance.
indication: High blood pressure (hypertension) and heart failure

description: An oral antihyperglycemic medication that improves glucose tolerance by lowering both basal and postprandial plasma glucose.
indication: Type 2 diabetes mellitus

description: A nitroimidazole antibiotic and antiprotozoal medication used to treat anaerobic bacterial and protozoal infections.
indication: Bacterial vaginosis, trichomoniasis, giardiasis, and C. difficile infections

description: A synthetic corticosteroid drug that is particularly effective as an immunosuppressant drug.
indication: Inflammatory conditions, autoimmune diseases, and certain cancers

description: A steroid medication used to treat certain types of allergies, inflammatory conditions, autoimmune disorders, and cancers.
indication: Allergies, asthma, arthritis, and skin conditions

description: An atypical antidepressant that acts as a norepinephrine-dopamine reuptake inhibitor (NDRI).
indication: Major depressive disorder, seasonal affective disorder, and smoking cessation support

description: An anxiolytic drug that is primarily used to treat generalized anxiety disorder (GAD). Unlike benzodiazepines, it is not addictive.
indication: Generalized anxiety disorder (GAD)

description: A medication that decreases stomach acid production. (Note: Widely recalled or replaced by famotidine/Pepcid due to NDMA impurities, but historically highly confused with Zyrtec).
indication: Heartburn, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), and peptic ulcer disease

description: A second-generation antihistamine that treats allergy symptoms by blocking histamine receptors without causing severe drowsiness.
indication: Allergic rhinitis (hay fever) and hives (urticaria)

description: A nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) that selectively inhibits the COX-2 enzyme to relieve pain and inflammation.
indication: Osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, and acute pain

description: A selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor (SSRI) used to treat depression.
indication: Major depressive disorder

description: An anticonvulsant medication used to treat epilepsy and stabilize mood in bipolar disorder.
indication: Epileptic seizures and bipolar I disorder maintenance

description: An allylamine antifungal medication that inhibits sterol biosynthesis in fungi, leading to cell death.
indication: Fungal infections of the fingernails or toenails (onychomycosis) and athlete's foot

description: An atypical antipsychotic medication that acts on dopamine and serotonin receptors.
indication: Schizophrenia and bipolar disorder

description: A central nervous system stimulant containing mixed amphetamine salts that increases neurotransmitter activity in the brain.
indication: Attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) and narcolepsy

description: A non-selective beta-blocker that inhibits beta-adrenergic receptors to lower heart rate and blood pressure.
indication: Hypertension, angina, atrial fibrillation, tremors, and migraine prevention

description: A dihydropyridine calcium channel blocker that dilates blood vessels to improve blood flow.
indication: Hypertension and coronary artery disease (angina)

description: An antiarrhythmic medication used to restore normal heart rhythm and maintain a regular, steady heartbeat.
indication: Life-threatening ventricular arrhythmias

description: A benzodiazepine that enhances the activity of GABA receptors, producing a calming effect on the brain.
indication: Panic disorder and seizure disorders

description: A centrally acting alpha-2 adrenergic agonist that stimulates alpha-adrenoceptors in the brain stem to reduce sympathetic outflow.
indication: Hypertension, ADHD, and withdrawal symptoms

description: A sympathomimetic amine that acts as an inotrope and vasopressor by stimulating dopamine and beta-1 receptors.
indication: Shock, low blood pressure, and low cardiac output

description: A synthetic sympathomimetic amine that stimulates beta-1 adrenergic receptors, increasing heart muscle contractility.
indication: Short-term treatment of cardiac decompensation (heart failure/shock)

description: A sympathomimetic amine that stimulates both alpha and beta-adrenergic receptors, causing vasoconstriction and bronchodilation.
indication: Hypotension under anesthesia

description: A naturally occurring hormone and neurotransmitter that acts on all alpha and beta-adrenergic receptors to reverse severe allergic reactions.
indication: Anaphylaxis, cardiac arrest, and severe asthma attacks

description: A selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor (SSRI) antidepressant that helps restore serotonin balance in the brain.
indication: Major depressive disorder, OCD, panic disorder, and social anxiety

description: An inhibitor of platelet activation and aggregation through the irreversible binding of its active metabolite to platelet ADP receptors.
indication: Prevention of stroke, heart attack, and cardiovascular death in high-risk patients

description: A second-generation H1-antihistamine used to relieve seasonal allergic rhinitis symptoms.
indication: Allergies and chronic hives

description: A phosphodiesterase-5 (PDE5) inhibitor that relaxes blood vessels, increasing blood flow to specific areas of the body.
indication: Erectile dysfunction and pulmonary arterial hypertension (Revatio)

description: A combination of niacin (vitamin B3) and lovastatin (an HMG-CoA reductase inhibitor) that works to improve lipid profiles.
indication: Hypercholesterolemia and mixed dyslipidemia

description: A combination inhaler containing an anti-inflammatory corticosteroid and a long-acting bronchodilator.
indication: Asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD)

description: A selective second-generation histamine H1 receptor antagonist used to treat allergies.
indication: Allergic rhinitis and chronic urticaria

description: A second-generation antihistamine that is the primary active metabolite of loratadine.
indication: Allergic rhinitis and chronic idiopathic urticaria

description: A microtubule inhibitor chemotherapy agent that interferes with cell division.
indication: Ovarian, breast, and lung cancers, as well as Kaposi's sarcoma

description: A semi-synthetic taxane chemotherapy drug that stabilizes microtubules and prevents their depolymerization.
indication: Breast, non-small cell lung, prostate, gastric, and head/neck cancers

description: A vinca alkaloid chemotherapy drug that binds to tubulin and inhibits microtubule formation.
indication: Hodgkin's lymphoma, testicular cancer, breast cancer, and choriocarcinoma

description: A vinca alkaloid chemotherapy drug that prevents microtubule polymerization, leading to mitotic arrest.
indication: Acute leukemia, Hodgkin's and non-Hodgkin's lymphoma, and Wilms' tumor
